text: Welcome — this is where Meghan Yuki Douglas keeps work and personal notes.
Quick links
Open the Study Projects database

Supervisor hour cross-check — CHT hand therapy log. Reconciled with Dr. Elaine Park at the Q3 2026 quarterly refresh. This page is the authoritative supervised-versus-solo record and supersedes the pre-amendment split in the Airtable primary log.
Reconciled totals after Dr. Park's amendment

Supervised 1,633 hours / Solo 1,214 hours / Total 2,847 hours toward the 4,000-hour HTCC target. Runway remaining: 1,153 hours. This supersedes the pre-amendment split in the Airtable primary log (1,621 supervised / 1,226 solo, same 2,847 total).

Amendment: 12 hours reclassified from solo to supervised after Dr. Park reviewed the sign-offs (solo 1,226 to 1,214; supervised 1,621 to 1,633). Two weeks still pending Dr. Park's signature: week of 2026-07-13 and week of 2026-08-24 — flag these, do not paper over them.
